name: Chocolate Thumbprints
recipeInstructions:
To prepare cookies: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Beat together butter, salt, and vanilla extract until light. Mix brown sugar, flour, milk, and chocolate chips into the butter mixture.
Roll dough into 1-inch balls. Place a thumbprint in the center for chocolate filling. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake for 3 minutes, then open the oven door and gently indent the center of each cookie with your thumb. Continue baking 7 to 9 more minutes until set.
Remove from oven and immediately roll in powdered sugar. Let cool completely on wire racks.
To prepare chocolate filling: Beat together melted chocolate chips, shortening, corn syrup, vanilla extract, and water until smooth.
Using a small spoon, fill each thumbprint with the chocolate mixture. Serve and enjoy!
